source: PseudoForge reviewed ntoskrnl 10.0.26200.8457 exception and unwind role-only identity profiles; no private field offsets.

profiles.source: Reviewed RtlpxVirtualUnwind x64 unwind flow where parameter 2 is the control PC/instruction pointer, not a structure context base.

parameters.source: RtlpxVirtualUnwind control PC argument used for image-relative unwind and epilogue instruction-byte checks
